case_title: DAVID ZANDMAN VS. BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF THE BAY AREA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ZANDMAN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF THE BAY AREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ZANDMAN, DAVID
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED OCT-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF THE BAY AREA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-07-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAVID ZANDMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF THE BAY AREA IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY SPIVEY, PROGRAM DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF THE BAY AREA IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY DAWN KRUGER,CEO. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF DAVID ZANDMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAWN KRUGER CEO. DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY SPIVEY REGIONAL DIRECTOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZANDMAN, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIG BROTHERS BIG SISTERS OF THE BAY AREA I FIND NO DUTY OF CARE THAT BBBS BREACHED HERE. THE SCREENING BBBS PERFORMED FOR PROSPECTIVE FAMILIES APPEARS SUFFICIENT AND IT IS NOT CLEAR THAT ADDITIONAL SCREENING WOULD HAVE PREVENTED THE HARM ZANDMAN SUFFERED FROM THE THIRD-PARTY PARENT. WITH REGARD TO BBBS'S ACTIONS AFTER THE TRO WAS FILED, I FIND THAT ZANDMAN HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT THERE IS ADDITIONAL INFORMATION BBBS COULD HAVE PROVIDED THAT WOULD HAVE OBVIATED HIS NEED TO INCUR LEGAL FEE TO DEFEND THE TRO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
